testcase.name: test_list_jobs

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain jobs key assert 'jobs' in [{'applications': 0, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T23:22:52.345607+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 0, 'benefits': 'Assurance, vacances', 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T23:19:33.464047+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 2, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T13:09:46.600015+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 2, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T12:53:13.504278+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 0, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T12:21:00.896122+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 0, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T12:19:55.870537+00:00', ...}, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notifications_iteration26.py:417: in test_list_jobs assert "jobs" in data, "Response should contain jobs key" E AssertionError: Response should contain jobs key E assert 'jobs' in [{'applications': 0, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T23:22:52.345607+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 0, 'benefits': 'Assurance, vacances', 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T23:19:33.464047+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 2, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T13:09:46.600015+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 2, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T12:53:13.504278+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 0, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T12:21:00.896122+00:00', ...}, {'applications': 0, 'benefits': None, 'contact_email': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-23T12:19:55.870537+00:00', ...}, ...]

testcase.name: test_subscription_checkout_creates_stripe_url
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notifications_iteration26.py:499: in test_subscription_checkout_creates_stripe_url assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create checkout: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create checkout: {"detail":"Type de package invalide"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
